gradeDescription: B = I practiced consistent good behaviour.
whatIDidToday: played with as many buddies as possible
noteworthyComments: I was very happy to play with Riker today. I did play with most of the dogs in the room, but Riker is always my favourite. I got a few corrections when we would go over threshold, especially when I slammed into the legs of the staff while playing. For today’s exercise, we worked on confidence building on a wheelchair and I did well. I jumped up with a good amount of confidence.
